nasb.text: And one will say to him, ‘What are these wounds between your arms?’ Then he will say, ‘Those with which I was wounded in the house of my friends.’

esv.text: And if one asks him, ‘What are these wounds on your back?’ he will say, ‘The wounds I received in the house of my friends.’

cnv.text: 如果有人問他：‘怎麼在你胸口上有這些傷痕呢？’他就必回答：‘這些是在愛我的人家裡所受的傷。’

ccb.text: 若有人问他，‘你胸口上的伤是怎么回事？’他必回答说，‘是在我朋友家弄伤的。’”
